title: D1 FOOTBALL ATHLETE DAY IN THE LIFE🏈 | MIAMI UNIVERSITY | SUMMER EDITION |FULL WORKOUT/RECRUIT VISIT
body: You prob ain’t gonna see this but I’m a junior in high school second year of contact football, DB and outside WR about to start my next season I might just be 2nd string and starting JV, I went to the football workouts, put some work in the off season to get better with footwork and the plays honestly don’t think the coaches will expect much what else do you think I could do to get better right before and during the season? Also if I don’t ball out this season what could I do to show out next season? I got 225 bench, last time I did squat was able to do 225 for 5 but because of a leg tweak haven’t done squats in a minute. 155 clean for 3. Weighing in at 180 6’1.
author: @soldierwind8111

title: CRNA School Vlog I Nurse Anesthesia Student Day In The Life (Episode 1-Didactic)
body:
Hi! I have worked as a respiratory therapist for the last 8+ years and now and in BSN schooling with plans to go for CRNA afterwards.
I was just wondering how long were you a nurse before applying for CRNA school? Also do you feel like the time you spent as a nurse before applying was enough or would you recommend more/less?
Thanks!
author: @fallynmayon2006

title: CRNA School Vlog I Nurse Anesthesia Student Day In The Life (Episode 1-Didactic)
body: Does NICU experience count for the ICU experience for CRNA school or would it have to be adult ICU? I been looking for the answer and i can’t seem to find it thank you to anyone who can offer some direction

title: Brutally Honest Harvard Campus Review #harvard #campustour #college
body: I remember visiting Harvard for the first time and getting lost and stuck in its courtyard💀Northeastern is actually in the city of Boston and is more spread out. Has some pretty cool buildings.😊
